title: Ashen's 3D Mace
description: A little addon that changes the Mace to be 3D.
body:
This overlay changes the default look of the **Ashen Mace** to a much more better **3D** Looking one.
For this pack to work, you have to put it above the original Ashen

If you encounter any issues, Please report it to me **mariofy** on the Official Ashen discord server, this is a fanmade Resource pack, it's not Aim_boot's responsibility to Take care of it so please don't even try asking him.

# Credits
- [Ashen 16x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen) by [Aim_boot](https://modrinth.com/user/Aim_Boot)
